title: Genuine Parts Appoints Bert Nappier To Succeed Carol Yancey As Finance Chief
text: Genuine Parts Co's  (NYSE: GPC) Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Carol Yancey has informed the board of her plan to retire at the end of May 2022. The company has appointed Bert Nappier as EVP and CFO-Elect, effective February 28, 2022.

title: 2 Dividend Stocks That Could Pay You Forever
text: This pair of income-paying superstars offers a potent combination of steady growth and long-term value.

title: Genuine Parts Company to Report Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings on February 17, 2022
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) plans to release Fourth Quarter Earnings on February 17, 2022. Management will also conduct a conference call on this date at 11:00 a.m.

title: Why Genuine Parts (GPC) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) to Issue $1B Senior Notes, Closes KDG Buyout
text: Genuine Parts Company (GPC) to raise $1 billion in senior notes to fund a significant portion of its recently completed acquisition of KDG.
